card_name_verified: Emirates Skywards Premium World Elite Mastercard (Barclays)

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Application Credit
recurring_credits.description: Reimbursement for Global Entry ($120) or TSA PreCheck ($85) application fee. Renews every 4 years aligned with credential validity.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: You can pay the application fee for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck and have it reimbursed

_review_reason: Most card value is in qualitative/conditional benefits: Emirates Gold tier (status), Priority Pass Select (lounge — non-quantified), 10,000 bonus miles after $30k annual spend (conditional, not pure recurring). Per OpenCard convention 'amount must be USD dollar value' — these qualitative perks excluded. Net: only Global Entry credit qualifies.
_excluded: 10,000 anniversary bonus miles after $30k spend (conditional, miles not USD)
